name: away_morning_wakeup_skipped_assertion
description: Away mode with bedtime setback active (79F). Wakeup event fires at 07:00 while still away. Production skips wakeup restore. The existing away-mode-classification-cycle golden mentions this behavior in notes but has no explicit assertion â€” this scenario adds the explicit assertion. simulator_support:false pending wakeup occupancy guard.
notes: The existing golden 'away-mode-classification-cycle' notes say wakeup is skipped while away
but has no explicit wakeup event or assertion for it.
This scenario adds that explicit assertion.
Covers Priority 6b away_morning_wakeup from plan abundant-mapping-clarke.md.

events.note: Morning classification â€” cool mode at comfort_cool=74F
User leaves â€” away setback applied (setback_cool=79F)
Bedtime fires while away â€” simulator applies bedtime setback (74+3=77F); away setback was 79F
Wakeup fires while still away â€” production: morning_wakeup_skipped. Simulator: comfort_restored (incorrect).

assertions.reason: Away setback: setback_cool=79F applied when user leaves on warm/cool day
Wakeup fires while away â€” production skips restore; setback maintained at away setback level
assertions.gap: Simulator _handle_wakeup() does not check occupancy. Production handle_morning_wakeup() guards on occupancy away/vacation before restoring comfort.

verdict.summary: Morning wakeup skipped while away â€” setback maintained, comfort NOT restored
verdict.observed_behavior: production: setback_applied (79F) on away; morning_wakeup_skipped at 07:00
verdict.expected_behavior: Wakeup event skipped when occupancy=away; away setback remains active until user returns
